name: Acid Attack
description: Add 1 Smash to every roll, even when no Smash was rolled.

name: Alien Metabolism
description: Power cards cost you 1 less Energy.

name: Alpha Monster
description: Gain 1 VP whenever your roll attacks another monster.

name: Armor Plating
description: Ignore any hit that would make you lose exactly 1 health.

name: Background Dweller
description: You may always reroll dice showing 3.

name: Burrowing
description: Add 1 Smash while in Tokyo. When you yield Tokyo, deal 1 damage to the monster entering it.

name: Camouflage
description: For each damage taken, roll a die; each Heart prevents one of that damage.

name: Complete Destruction
description: Roll all six different symbols together to gain 9 extra VP.

name: Dedicated News Team
description: Gain 1 VP whenever you buy a Power card.

name: Eater of the Dead
description: Gain 3 VP whenever another monster is eliminated.

name: Energy Hoarder
description: At turn end, gain 1 VP for every 6 Energy you hold.

name: Even Bigger
description: Raise maximum health to 12 and immediately heal 2 health.

name: Extra Head
description: Roll one additional die each turn.

name: Extra Head
description: Roll one additional die each turn.

name: Fire Breathing
description: When your attack causes damage, the neighboring monsters each lose 1 health.

name: Freeze Time
description: Resolve three 1s to take another turn using one fewer die.

name: Friend of Children
description: Whenever you gain one or more Energy, gain 1 additional Energy.

name: Giant Brain
description: You may reroll one additional time each turn.

name: Gourmet
description: When you resolve three or more 1s, gain 2 extra VP.

name: Healing Ray
description: Your Heart dice may heal other monsters; they pay you 2 Energy per health restored when able.

name: Herbivore
description: Gain 1 VP on each turn in which you damage no other monster.

name: Herd Culler
description: Once per turn, you may change one die result to 1.

name: It Has a Child
description: When eliminated, discard your cards and VP, then return once with 10 health.

name: Jets
description: When you yield Tokyo after an attack, restore the health lost from that attack.

name: Made in a Lab
description: During buying, you may inspect and buy the top card of the deck.

name: Metamorph
description: At turn end, you may discard Keep cards to regain their printed Energy cost.

name: Mimic
description: Copy another monster's Keep card; pay 1 Energy on your turn to move the Mimic token.

name: Battery Monster
description: Place 6 Energy here. At each turn start take 2; discard this card when empty.

name: Nova Breath
description: Your attacks hit every other monster, regardless of Tokyo.

name: Omnivore
description: Resolve at least one 1, one 2, and one 3 together to gain 2 VP.

name: Opportunist
description: Whenever a new market card appears, you get the first chance to buy it.

name: Parasitic Tentacles
description: You may buy another monster's Keep cards by paying that monster their printed cost.

name: Plot Twist
description: Change one die to any result, then discard this card.

name: Poison Quills
description: When you resolve three or more 2s, every other monster loses 2 health.

name: Poison Spit
description: Monsters you damage gain a Poison token and lose 1 health per token at turn end; Hearts remove tokens outside Tokyo.

name: Psychic Probe
description: Once per opponent turn, reroll one of their dice; discard this if the new result is a Heart.

name: Rapid Healing
description: At any time, spend 2 Energy to restore 1 health.

name: Regeneration
description: Whenever you heal, restore 1 additional health.

name: Rooting for the Underdog
description: At turn end, gain 1 VP if you have the fewest VP.

name: Shrink Ray
description: Monsters you damage gain a Shrink token and roll one fewer die per token; Hearts remove tokens outside Tokyo.

name: Smoke Cloud
description: Comes with 3 Smoke tokens; spend one for an extra reroll, then discard when empty.

name: Solar Powered
description: At turn end, gain 1 Energy if you have none.

name: Spiked Tail
description: If you roll at least one Smash, add 1 Smash to the roll.

name: Stretchy
description: Spend 2 Energy to change one die to any result.

name: Telepath
description: Spend 1 Energy for one additional reroll; this can be repeated.

name: Urbavore
description: Gain 1 extra VP when starting in Tokyo; while there, a roll with Smash gains 1 additional Smash.

name: We're Only Making It Stronger!
description: Whenever a single effect makes you lose 2 or more health, gain 1 Energy.

name: Wings
description: Spend 2 Energy to avoid all health loss during another monster's turn.

name: Apartment Building
description: Gain 3 VP.

name: Commuter Train
description: Gain 2 VP.

name: Corner Store
description: Gain 1 VP.

name: Death From Above
description: Gain 2 VP and take control of Tokyo; its current ruler must yield.

name: Energize
description: Gain 9 Energy.

name: Evacuation Orders
description: Every other monster loses 5 VP.

name: Evacuation Orders
description: Every other monster loses 5 VP.

name: Fire Blast
description: Every other monster loses 2 health.

name: Frenzy
description: Take another turn immediately after this one.

name: Gas Refinery
description: Gain 2 VP; every other monster loses 3 health.

name: Heal
description: Restore 2 health.

name: High Altitude Bombing
description: Every monster, including you, loses 3 health.

name: Jet Fighters
description: Gain 5 VP, then lose 4 health.

name: National Guard
description: Gain 2 VP, then lose 2 health.

name: Nuclear Power Plant
description: Gain 2 VP and restore 3 health.

name: Skyscraper
description: Gain 4 VP.

name: Tanks
description: Gain 4 VP, then lose 3 health.

name: Vast Storm
description: Gain 2 VP; every other monster loses 1 Energy for every 2 Energy they hold.
